_notes.model_size: Int8-quantized ONNX (model_quantized.onnx) is 44.4 MB. General-purpose successor to MODNet (which was portrait-optimized and produced unusable masks on non-portrait inputs). Verification: docs/superpowers/plans/phase-18-verification-log.md (committed b4eb8df). Empirical peak RSS ~1.5 GB on the 8 GB dev box.
_notes.ort_version: Tied to onnxruntime-web 1.26.0-dev.20260416-b7804b056c (the version pinned by @huggingface/transformers 4.2.0). If transformers.js bumps, regenerate these wasm sha256 values.
_notes.pipeline: Loadable via pipeline('image-segmentation', 'bg-remove', { dtype: 'q8' }). transformers.js's q8 dtype maps suffix '_quantized', resolving to onnx/model_quantized.onnx. The model directory name 'bg-remove' is hardcoded in scripts/copy-bg-models.mjs and src/engines/image-bg-remove/model-loader.ts (MODEL_ID); the manifest's 'model' field controls the cache directory name only.
_notes.license_note: RMBG-1.4 ships under BRIA's bria-rmbg-1.4 license — non-commercial use only; commercial use requires a paid license from BRIA. Acceptable for this project (personal solo-user file converter, no monetization). Disclosure on /about engines table is queued for Phase 26 master-spec amendments.
